title: aethusa cynapium var. elata
intro: Aethusa cynapium var. elata, also known as tall hemlock, is a variety of the Aethusa cynapium plant, a flowering plant in the carrot family native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Aethusa cynapium var. elata include its expectorant and diuretic properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues and reduce fluid retention. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to help alleviate coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Aethusa cynapium var. elata can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and respiratory health.
